chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-3351 of 2015 --------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------- For order as to non-prosecution. 30.09.2016 None present for the Petitioner. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - On the last date of hearing also nobody was present for the petitioner and matter was fixed for non-prosecution. In the interests of justice one week’s time was granted for compliance. Today again neither the petitioner is present nor his counsel. The matter is pending since 2014 for non-prosecution which shows that the petitioner has lost interest in this case. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Asif
